meaning: n.判决,逮捕,命令,告示,扣押
examples: But the word spread rapidly among journalists in Paris, prompting Arret Sur Images to start chasing the report, he said.
Arret Sur Images ("Freeze Frame") said journalists had listened in on the conversation but had agreed not to report it.
Dan Israel, the Arret Sur Images writer who broke the story, told CNN that about three minutes of the leaders' private conversation could be heard.
